# Bug: carto link always creates a self-loop

> Bug ID: CART-BUG-002
> Severity: major
> Status: 🔴 reported
> Reported: 2026-06-03

## Description

In link() in src/store/graph.ts, the dst node is looked up using fromTitle instead of toTitle, so every edge becomes a self-loop: both from and to resolve to the same node. The target node never gains an inbound edge and exports show nodes linking only to themselves.
